tools.name: whats_on
tools.description: Ranked events + a citation-ready prose summary for an area and time window.

tools.name: search_events
tools.description: Full-text, typo-tolerant search over events, with optional date range.

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Full detail for one event (incl. booking URL) by public id/slug.

tools.name: get_venue
tools.description: Full detail for one venue by id.

tools.name: plan_visit
tools.description: Heuristic itinerary: morning/afternoon/evening picks matching interests within a window.

tools.name: subscribe
tools.description: Start a double-opt-in email subscription. Sends a confirmation email; consent is recorded only on confirm.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_event · Public sink: subscribe.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_event · Public sink: subscribe

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
